summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Marcoss Peluquería-Barbería website. All backend APIs working perfectly. Frontend components loading correctly with full booking flow functional. Mobile responsiveness excellent with dedicated call button.
passed_tests: Backend API /api/ root endpoint returns correct response
Backend API /api/services returns 6 services with proper structure
Backend API /api/available-slots/{date} returns available time slots
Backend API /api/appointments POST creates appointments successfully
Sunday correctly marked as closed in available slots
Invalid date format properly handled with 400 error
Landing page loads correctly with all sections
Hero section displays with background image and CTAs
Services section loads 6 services from API with prices
Booking modal opens from header, hero section, and service items
Booking modal 3-step flow works completely (service selection, date/time, contact details)
Appointment creation successful with backend integration
Mobile responsive design works at 390px width
Mobile call button visible and positioned correctly
Mobile navigation menu functional with booking and call options
